session.user: Run `make ty` and report results. This is a READ-ONLY check - do not modify files.
session.assistant: I'll run the type checking tool and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run type checking with make ty

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 make: *** [Makefile:21: ty] Error 1
uv run ty check error[unresolved-import]: Cannot resolve imported module `erk_shared.core.plan_list_service` --> src/erk/core/services/pr_list_service.py:16:6 | 14 | from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Any 15 | 16 | from erk_shared.core.plan_list_service import PrListData as PrListData | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 17 | from erk_shared.core.plan_list_service import PrListService 18 | from erk_shared.gateway.github.abc import LocalGitHub | info: Searched in the following paths during module resolution: info: 1. /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src (first-party code) info: 2. /home/runner/work/erk/erk (first-party code) info: 3. vendored://stdlib (stdlib typeshed stubs vendored by ty) info: 4. /home/runner/work/erk/erk/.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages (site-packages) info: 5. /home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev/src (editable install) info: ... and 5 more paths. ty failed: 2 unresolved import errors
The type checker found 2 import resolution errors in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/core/services/pr_list_service.py`:

The imports appear to reference a module that doesn't exist in the configured environment or has been moved/renamed.
